## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing client projects, new accounts, and team coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three new accounts (Okta, Diligent, Sentinel-1) kicking off next week; require tailored approaches](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [AirByte shifting to focus on content refreshes for 2 weeks; aiming for high volume to test capacity](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Handoff processes for transitioning accounts need refinement; Dig to assist with scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Biologica workflow development ongoing; exploring AI-assisted editing techniques](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### New Account Kickoffs

  - [Okta: Custom approach focused on outbound motion, not typical editorial](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Diligent: PE-backed, emphasis on quick wins alongside strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Sentinel-1: Similar to Outreach/Abnormal, content not locked down, large org to navigate](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### AirByte Project Update

  - [Shifting to content refresh focus for next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

  - [Using SEO testing to track performance of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/zAuKomoww16z3nVSiRrF256VSwxVyy3P?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
